title: OutlierDetectionModel
content:
# OutlierDetectionModel

The model to use for outlier detection. This is used in the outlier detection algorithm to determine how to identify outliers in the data.

## Enum Values

- `z_score`
summary: The model to use for outlier detection. This is used in the outlier detection algorithm to determine how to identify outliers in the data.
